/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libdinput8_native.so -o libdinput8_native.so CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/BaseMethodHook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/DataQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/dllmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/GameEngineUpdate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/GetPrivateStash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/GrimTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/HookLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/InventorySack_AddItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/OnDemandSeedInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/SetHardcore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/SettingsReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dinput8_native.dir/TcpClient.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0
